description: Line item in an invoice containing detailed billing information for a product.

pcfControls.description: Use this control to enable address autocomplete feature powered by Bing Maps API

fields.description: Rollup of Discretionary Discounts on related Invoice Line Items
Value of the Discretionary Discount in base currency.
Specifies the amount of Discretionary Discount
Value of the Discretionary Discount Amt in base currency.
Specifies whether the write-in product is SaaS
Date the license starts
Specifies the number of months the license is valid through. Non-renewable products should be 0 mos.
Describes the type of print material the product is e.g. LifeSkills,
Unique identifier of the Software License the Invoice Product is associated with.
Specifies the price per unit without discounts
Value of the Unit Price in base currency.
Shows the total amount due for the invoice product, based on the sum of the unit price, quantity, discounts, and tax.
Unique identifier for the invoicedetail record.
Invoice Detail Name. Added for 1:n referential relationship (internal purposes only)
Unique identifier of the invoice associated with the invoice product line item.
Select whether the product exists in the Microsoft Dynamics 365 product catalog or is a write-in product specific to the parent invoice.
Type the manual discount amount for the invoice product to deduct any negotiated or other savings from the product total.
Type the price per unit of the invoice product. The default is the value in the price list specified on the parent invoice for existing products.
Type a name or description to identify the type of write-in product included in the invoice.
Calculated field that will be populated by name and description of the product.
